headline: Allegion CEO To Outline Long Term Plan And Valuation Context
summary: Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) CEO is scheduled to present the company's long term strategy at the 2026 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference. The conference appearance is expected to feature an updated view on Allegion's priorities across its security product portfolio and related services. Investors will be watching for any comments that frame capital allocation, product focus, or geographic priorities for the coming years. Allegion focuses on security products and solutions, including...
